title: Massachusetts Department of Labor Relations (DLR) — Agency Landing Page
description: Scrape of the MA Department of Labor Relations landing page. DLR administers and enforces public-sector collective-bargaining law under M.G.L. c.150E: investigating/adjudicating unfair-labor-practice (prohibited-practice) charges, conducting bargaining-unit elections, and providing mediation and fact-finding. The most critical agency for SEIU Local 509 DDS-chapter matters. Also notes DLR's new role administering rideshare-driver unionization after the Nov 2024 ballot measure.
notes: No filing deadline on this landing page; prohibited-practice charge deadlines are 6 months from knowledge (see sub-01-dlr-ulp-procedures). File ~7.5 KB.
